name: What common mistakes ruin work injury claims in Idaho?
description: Delay reporting, bad adjuster talks, skipping docs.[3][7]

mainEntity.name: What common mistakes ruin work injury claims in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Delay reporting, bad adjuster talks, skipping docs.[3][7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Top errors: Delaying report beyond 60 days, skipping medical care, talking too much to adjusters, ignoring treatment.[3][7] These enable denials.[7] Key factors: No documentation; signing bad releases; missing deadlines.[3] Practical guidance: Report day-of, document all, get lawyer before settling. Avoid pitfalls for full benefits.
